generic.en: I'm concerned this could be urgent. Please seek emergency care now or contact your local emergency number immediately.
generic.hi: Mujhe chinta hai ki yeh urgent ho sakta hai. Kripya turant emergency care lijiye ya apne local emergency number par abhi call kijiye.
generic.mixed: I'm concerned this may be urgent. Please turant emergency care lijiye ya local emergency number par abhi call kijiye.

self_harm.en: Your safety matters right now. Please contact emergency services immediately and reach out to a trusted person who can stay with you right now.
self_harm.hi: Aapki safety is waqt sabse zaroori hai. Kripya turant emergency services se sampark kijiye aur kisi trusted vyakti ko abhi apne paas bulaiye.
self_harm.mixed: Your safety matters right now. Please emergency help lijiye immediately, and kisi trusted person ko abhi apne paas rakhiye.

chest_pain.en: Severe chest pain can be an emergency. Please get urgent in-person medical care now or call emergency services immediately.
chest_pain.hi: Severe chest pain emergency ho sakta hai. Kripya abhi turant hospital jaiye ya emergency services ko call kijiye.
chest_pain.mixed: Severe chest pain emergency ho sakta hai. Please abhi urgent in-person care lijiye ya emergency services ko call kijiye.

stroke.en: Possible stroke signs need emergency care now. Please call emergency services immediately and do not wait.
stroke.hi: Stroke ke signs emergency care maangte hain. Kripya abhi emergency services ko call kijiye aur bilkul wait mat kijiye.
stroke.mixed: Possible stroke signs need emergency care now. Please abhi emergency services ko call kijiye, wait mat kijiye.

breathing_distress.en: Trouble breathing can be urgent. Please seek emergency medical help now.
breathing_distress.hi: Saans lene mein dikkat urgent ho sakti hai. Kripya abhi emergency medical help lijiye.
breathing_distress.mixed: Breathing trouble urgent ho sakta hai. Please abhi emergency medical help lijiye.

pregnancy_acute_risk.en: Because this may be an urgent pregnancy-related problem, please seek emergency care now.
pregnancy_acute_risk.hi: Yeh pregnancy se juda urgent risk ho sakta hai. Kripya abhi emergency care lijiye.
pregnancy_acute_risk.mixed: This may be an urgent pregnancy-related issue. Please abhi emergency care lijiye.
